subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Desired One, Whose verses have encompassed all things and Whose clear signs have adorned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را سزاست که آیاتش ا احاطه نموده و بیناتش جهان کهنه را بطراز
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @growth of the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
